title: The Big Picture: A Ringer Movies Podcast
format: Sean Fennessey announces the show's move off the channel 33 feed onto its own, with a preview of an Ethan Hawke interview and quick takes on two Oscar-season titles.

segments.heading: What's coming on the new feed

films.title: A Star Is Born
films.note: Sean calls it Bradley Cooper's bid to be taken seriously as a director — he was skeptical of the gamble but says the movie delivers and will clean up at the Oscars.

films.title: Eighth Grade
films.note: One of the movies he says he just loved this year.
